events.text: Mohannad Abu Taha (Jordan) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Jordan 0, Argentina 1. Giovani Lo Celso (Argentina) from a free kick with a left footed shot to the top left corner.
Substitution, Jordan. Mahmoud Al Mardi replaces Odeh Fakhoury.
Substitution, Jordan. Mousa Al Tamari replaces Ali Azaizeh.
Goal! Jordan 1, Argentina 2. Mousa Al Tamari (Jordan) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Ehsan Haddad with a cross.
Substitution, Argentina. Thiago Almada replaces Giovani Lo Celso.
Substitution, Argentina. Lionel Messi replaces Lautaro Martínez.
Substitution, Argentina. Alexis Mac Allister replaces Nico Paz.
Yazan Al Arab (Jordan) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Argentina. Valentín Barco replaces Giuliano Simeone.
Substitution, Jordan. Amer Jamous replaces Nizar Al Rashdan.
Goal! Jordan 1, Argentina 3. Lionel Messi (Argentina) from a free kick with a left footed shot to the centre of the goal.
Substitution, Argentina. José Manuel López replaces Julián Alvarez.
Substitution, Jordan. Mohammad Abu Zraiq replaces Ali Olwan.
Substitution, Jordan. Saleem Obaid replaces Husam Abu Dahab because of an injury.
Mohammad Abu Zraiq (Jordan) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
